an5.213:1.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these five dangers for an immoral person because of his deficiency in virtuous behavior. What five?
an5.213:1.2: (1) "Here, an immoral person deficient in virtuous behavior loses much wealth because of heedlessness. This is the first danger for an immoral person because of his deficiency in virtuous behavior.
an5.213:1.3: (2) "Again, a bad report circulates about an immoral person deficient in virtuous behavior. This is the second danger ….
an5.213:1.4: (3) "Again, whatever assembly an immoral person deficient in virtuous behavior approaches—whether of khattiyas, brahmins, householders, or ascetics—he approaches it timid and disconcerted. This is the third danger ….
an5.213:1.5: (4) "Again, an immoral person deficient in virtuous behavior dies confused. This is the fourth danger ….
an5.213:1.6: (5) "Again, with the breakup of the body, after death, an immoral person deficient in virtuous behavior is reborn in the plane of misery, in a bad destination, in the lower world, in hell. This is the fifth danger ….
an5.213:2.2: "These are the five dangers for an immoral person because of his deficiency in virtuous behavior.
an5.213:2.3: "Bhikkhus, there are these five benefits for a virtuous person because of his accomplishment in virtuous behavior. What five?
an5.213:2.4: (1) "Here, a virtuous person accomplished in virtuous behavior accumulates much wealth because of heedfulness. This is the first benefit for a virtuous person because of his accomplishment in virtuous behavior.
an5.213:2.5: (2) "Again, a virtuous person accomplished in virtuous behavior acquires a good reputation. This is the second benefit ….
an5.213:2.6: (3) "Again, whatever assembly a virtuous person accomplished in virtuous behavior approaches—whether of khattiyas, brahmins, householders, or ascetics—he approaches it confidently and composed. This is the third benefit ….
an5.213:2.7: (4) "Again, a virtuous person accomplished in virtuous behavior dies unconfused. This is the fourth benefit ….
an5.213:2.8: (5) "Again, with the breakup of the body, after death, a virtuous person accomplished in virtuous behavior is reborn in a good destination, in a heavenly world. This is the fifth benefit ….
an5.213:2.9: "These are the five benefits for a virtuous person because of his accomplishment in virtuous behavior."
